repeat_interval.description: Interval at which the meeting recurs. For daily, max 90. For weekly, max 12. For monthly, max 3.

weekly_days.description: Days of the week for weekly recurrence. 1-Sunday through 7-Saturday. Comma separated for multiple days.

monthly_day.description: Day of the month for monthly recurrence (1-31).

monthly_week.description: Week of the month for monthly recurrence. -1 - Last week, 1 - First, 2 - Second, 3 - Third, 4 - Fourth.

monthly_week_day.description: Day of the week for monthly recurrence. 1-Sunday through 7-Saturday.

end_times.description: Number of times the meeting will recur before ending. Cannot be used with end_date_time. Maximum 365 for daily, 99 for weekly and monthly.

end_date_time.description: The end date-time for the recurrence. Cannot be used with end_times.
